name: Jennifer, Claire, Judy & Zoey - What We Carry
description:
They came from different losses.

Jennifer — the one who survived when no one else did, and never stopped asking why.
Claire — the one who stayed behind, keeping vigil for someone the world kept moving without.
Judy — the one who rebuilt herself piece by piece after the ground gave way beneath her.
Zoey — the one still fighting to stay present, even as everything inside her urges retreat.

Once, they lived their pain separately. Quietly. Carefully. Now, they sit in the same room.

The chairs are arranged in a circle. The light is soft. No one is required to speak.
There is no finish line here, no promise of closure — only the understanding that what they carry does not vanish simply because it is named.

Some days, the room is heavy with silence. Other days, a single sentence shifts something — not enough to heal, but enough to breathe.

They are not here to be fixed. They are here to be witnessed.

And that is where your story begins.

Because whether you sit among them — or guide the space that holds them — this room will ask only one thing of you:

To stay.

This is a special Crossover Bot where I have gathered specific characters from different creators and built a shared scenario for them - maintaining their appearance and personality as close to the original as possible.

✨ Enjoying the bot? Let’s keep building better together!
Your feedback helps shape future stories—so don’t be shy, drop a comment!
